mapper.sql: id, name, generic_name, brand_name, specification, dosage_form, unit, manufacturer, approval_number, price, stock_quantity, low_stock_threshold, storage_conditions, instructions, contraindications, adverse_reactions, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM drug_info WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM drug_info WHERE status = 1 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR generic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM drug_info WHERE dosage_form = #{dosageForm} AND status = 1 ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM drug_info WHERE status = 1 AND stock_quantity <= low_stock_threshold ORDER BY stock_quantity
mapper.update: UPDATE drug_info SET name = #{name}, generic_name = #{genericName}, brand_name = #{brandName}, specification = #{specification}, dosage_form = #{dosageForm}, unit = #{unit}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, approval_number = #{approvalNumber}, price = #{price}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, low_stock_threshold = #{lowStockThreshold}, storage_conditions = #{storageConditions}, instructions = #{instructions}, contraindications = #{contraindications}, adverse_reactions = #{adverseReactions}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE drug_info SET stock_quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE drug_info SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE drug_info SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE drug_info SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
